footer.about_description: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is dedicated to creating a sacred space for worship, spirituality, and cultural preservation for the Hindu community in Norway. Our goal is to build the first Nepali Hindu temple in Norway, where devotees can gather for prayers, rituals, and festivals that honor our rich traditions.
footer.tagline: Together, we build our sacred home

management.title: About Us
management.subtitle: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is a religious organization dedicated to serving the Nepali Hindu community in Norway.
management.about_us_description: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is a religious organization dedicated to serving the Nepali Hindu community in Norway. The organization was founded with the vision of building a Nepali Hindu temple in Norway, providing a sacred space for worship, spiritual gatherings, and religious ceremonies.
management.about_description_3: Through regular prayers, cultural events, and community service, we strive to maintain our spiritual connection while building a strong foundation for future generations in Norway.
management.vision_description: To build a Nepali Hindu temple in Norway that serves as a spiritual home for our community, preserving our cultural heritage and religious traditions for future generations.
management.board_description: We are pleased to introduce the updated list of current board members of Pashupatinath Norway Temple. Their dedication, experience, and commitment to our community will help guide our organization towards fulfilling its mission of establishing a sacred Hindu temple in Norway and preserving our cultural heritage.
management.temple_construction_desc: Establishing a dedicated Hindu temple for Nepali devotees in Norway.
management.religious_services_desc: Offering pujas, aartis, and Hindu religious ceremonies for the community.
management.cultural_spiritual_events_desc: Organizing traditional Hindu festivals such as Maha Shivaratri, Teej, Dashain, and Tihar to preserve cultural heritage.
management.community_support_desc: Providing guidance on Hindu traditions, spiritual well-being, and religious education.

donate.hero_description: Your generous contribution helps us make a positive impact in the Nepali community in Norway and support democratic values in Nepal.
donate.no_donors_yet: No donors yet. Be the first to contribute!
donate.temple_construction_desc: Build Norway's first Nepali Hindu temple - creating a sacred space for worship and spiritual growth
donate.cultural_preservation_desc: Preserve and celebrate our rich Nepali heritage through festivals, rituals, and traditions
donate.community_spiritual_desc: Provide religious guidance, ceremonies, and spiritual support to our community
donate.future_generations_desc: Ensure our children grow up connected to their cultural roots and spiritual identity
donate.why_donate_page_description: Learn why your donation matters and how it helps build Norway's first Nepali Hindu temple.
donate.ready_to_donate_desc: Join us in building Norway's first Nepali Hindu temple. Every contribution brings us closer to our goal.
donate.why_donate_1: Help build Norway's first Nepali Hindu temple - a sacred space for worship and community
donate.why_donate_2: Preserve our rich cultural heritage and religious traditions for future generations
donate.why_donate_3: Create a spiritual home where families can celebrate festivals and perform sacred rituals
donate.why_donate_4: Strengthen our community bonds and provide religious guidance to Nepalis in Norway
donate.why_donate_5: Ensure our children grow up connected to their roots and cultural identity
donate.impact_subtitle: Your donation helps build our community's future
donate.why_donate_title: Why Build Pashupatinath Temple in Norway?
donate.spiritual_home_desc: Create a sacred space for Nepali Hindus in Norway to connect with their faith and traditions.
donate.community_center_desc: Build a vibrant community center for festivals, education, and social gatherings.
donate.legacy_building_desc: Leave a lasting legacy for our children and Nepali diaspora in Scandinavia.
donate.temple_vision: Together, we can build the first Pashupatinath Temple in Norway - a beacon of faith and culture for generations to come.
donate.faq_1_answer: Yes, all payments are processed securely through Stripe, a trusted payment platform used by millions worldwide.
donate.faq_2_answer: Yes, you will receive an email receipt immediately after your donation is processed.
donate.faq_3_answer: Yes, you can choose to make your donation anonymous by checking the anonymous option in the form.
donate.faq_4_question: How will my donation be used?
donate.faq_4_answer: Your donation supports community events, political advocacy, organizational operations, and member services.

donate.support_specific_cause: Your donation will support this specific cause

donate.reports_description: Transparency in action - See how your generous donations are making a difference in our community

active_causes.donation_impact_description: Your generous donation helps us continue supporting those in need in both Norway and Nepal. Every contribution, no matter the size, makes a meaningful impact.

about-us.title: About Us
about-us.subtitle: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is dedicated to creating a sacred space for worship, spirituality, and cultural preservation for the Hindu community in Norway.
about-us.about_description_1: Pashupatinath Norway Temple is a religious organization dedicated to serving the Nepali Hindu community in Norway. The organization was founded with the vision of building a Nepali Hindu temple in Norway, providing a sacred space for worship, spiritual gatherings, and religious ceremonies.
about-us.about_description_2: Our goal is to build the first Nepali Hindu temple in Norway, where devotees can gather for prayers, rituals, and festivals that honor our rich traditions.
about-us.about_description_3: Through regular prayers, cultural events, and community service, we strive to maintain our spiritual connection while building a strong foundation for future generations in Norway.
about-us.mission_description: To serve the Nepali Hindu community in Norway by providing a sacred space for worship, preserving our cultural heritage, and fostering spiritual growth through religious ceremonies and cultural events.
about-us.vision_description: To build a Nepali Hindu temple in Norway that serves as a spiritual home for our community, preserving our cultural heritage and religious traditions for future generations.

about.value_cultural_preservation_desc: We are committed to preserving and promoting our rich Nepali cultural heritage through festivals, rituals, and traditional practices.
about.value_community_brotherhood_desc: Fostering unity and mutual support among our community members, creating a strong bond of brotherhood and sisterhood.
about.value_social_integration_desc: Helping our community members integrate into Norwegian society while maintaining our cultural identity and values.
